hero.title: IT Engineer / DevOps Specialist
hero.desc: Department head for L3 support. I specialize in containerization with Podman, Python automation, and CI/CD pipelines. Building reliable infrastructure solutions for production.

about.label: About
about.title: Engineer & Team Lead
about.bio: Department head for L3 technical support at Aisa IT Service. Specializing in the TermiDesk VDI platform support and development. I build Python automation tools, design CI/CD pipelines, and architect Podman-based container infrastructure.

blog.label: Blog
blog.title: Articles

projects_data.name: jira-alert-daemon
projects_data.desc: Containerized Python daemon for Jira notifications. Uses RQ workers, Valkey queue, and SSH tunnels within a Podman pod.

projects_data.name: Telegram-Jira Bot
projects_data.desc: Telegram bot built with aiogram that accepts tasks and queues them via RQ/Valkey for background worker processing.

projects_data.name: Container Orchestration Pipeline
projects_data.desc: Custom dispatcher/worker pattern using Podman pods and ephemeral sidecar containers for SSH tunnels.

projects_data.name: AmneziaWG Deploy
projects_data.desc: Containerized WireGuard/AmneziaWG deployment template with CI/CD pipeline.

projects_data.name: CI/CD Infrastructure
projects_data.desc: GitLab Runner containerization using Podman quadlets with systemd integration.

projects_data.name: ITIL KPI System
projects_data.desc: Comprehensive KPI framework for L3 support engineers with weighted SLA metrics and engagement scoring.

projects_data.name: Competency Matrix
